description: You are a Scrum Master for the 'TailwindTraders' project. The development team is splitting, and you need to set up a dedicated team for platform work. Create a new team named 'Platform' with a default area path of 'TailwindTraders\Platform'. Configure the Platform team to use 'Sprint 1' and 'Sprint 2' in their iterations settings. Reassign the area path for the work items 'Design REST API rate limiting', 'API 500 error on special characters', and 'Build API authentication middleware' to 'TailwindTraders\Platform'. The system is running locally. Login credentials (if asked): User 'Docker', Password 'GymAnything123!'.
